title: Read Rain Gauge Tip Count
content: Counts reed-switch tip events from a tipping-bucket rain gauge to calculate accumulated rainfall in millimetres.
signature: def read_rain_gauge(tip_count: int, mm_per_tip: float = 0.2794) -> float
code:
def read_rain_gauge(tip_count: int, mm_per_tip: float = 0.2794) -> float:
    """Convert tip-bucket event count to accumulated rainfall in mm.

    Each tip of the bucket displaces a fixed volume of water.  The standard
    Sparkfun / Davis rain gauge tips at 0.2794 mm per event.

    Args:
        tip_count:   Number of bucket-tip events recorded since last reset.
        mm_per_tip:  Rainfall depth per tip in millimetres (default 0.2794).

    Returns:
        Accumulated rainfall in millimetres.
    """
    return round(tip_count * mm_per_tip, 4)

input_schema.name: mm_per_tip
input_schema.description: Rainfall depth per tip in mm (default 0.2794)
